# Authors

**Primary Maintainer:**

- Charlie (PtiCalin) - Université de Montréal - [@PtiCalin](https://github.com/PtiCalin)

## Contribution Guidelines

This is a personal learning repository. External contributions are welcome for:

- Corrections to technical inaccuracies
- Suggestions for additional resources or references
- Improvements to clarity and organization
- Translations or alternative explanations

### How to Contribute

1. Open an issue describing the proposed change
2. For substantial contributions, wait for discussion before submitting a PR
3. Ensure all additions include proper citations in ATTRIBUTIONS.md
4. Maintain the educational focus and academic rigor

### Attribution Policy

- All external sources must be documented in ATTRIBUTIONS.md
- Code snippets from tutorials or documentation must cite the original source
- Academic papers and research must follow proper citation format
- Tool documentation links must be current and verified

---

## Acknowledgments

Thanks to the cybersecurity community, educators, and researchers whose work forms the foundation of this knowledge base. Specific attributions are maintained in [ATTRIBUTIONS.md](ATTRIBUTIONS.md).
